name: Government Data Generator
description: Generate realistic mock data for government applications and civic tech projects

functions.name: generate_government_data
functions.description: Generate mock government data for testing and development purposes

dataType.description: Type of government data to generate

fields.description: Specific fields to include in the generated data

functions.description: Get a list of all available government data types

functions.name: get_data_type_info
functions.description: Get information about a specific data type and its available fields

dataType.description: The data type to get information about

examples.user: Generate 10 citizen records with SSN and voting status
examples.assistant: I'll generate 10 citizen records with SSN and voting status for you.

examples.user: What government data types are available?
examples.assistant: Let me check what government data types are available.

examples.user: Show me the fields available for employee data
examples.assistant: I'll get the field information for employee data.
